title: Additional Office Space. An LMA shall report to the Department the
content: 31 acquisition of additional office space. The additional office space shall be adjacent to the 32 registered main office or within the same building. Office spaces located at a different 33 building shall be considered adjacent to the registered business address, if it is situated 34 not more than two hundred (200) meters from the registered business address. 35 36 The notification for the acquisition of an additional office space shall be accompanied with 37 supporting documents as may be provided in another issuance. 38 39 G. BRANCH OFFICE 40 41
